## Security Checklist
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] No production data or PII in code or comments
- [ ] Input validation is implemented for user-facing inputs
- [ ] Dependencies are from trusted sources
- [ ] No new `eval()`, `Function()`, or dynamic code execution
- [ ] Error messages do not expose internal details

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
- [ ] ESLint passes with zero warnings
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Reviewer Notes
<!-- Any specific areas you want reviewers to focus on? -->

---

> **Governance reminder:** AI-generated code must pass the same CI gates as human code.
> All PRs require CODEOWNERS approval before merge.
